{{Infobox artifact
| name = Golden box
| introduced = tg-01-house-of-blades
}}

== House of Blades ==
{{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|A large pure gold box carved with whirling symbols sits just inside the gates of [[Elysia]] and can shoot a thousand glowing golden arrows.}}

[[Category:Artifacts]]
[[Category:House of Blades]]
